name: office
description: Office contested (e.g. US PRESIDENT, US SENATE, GOVERNOR).

name: district
description: District of the office; blank for statewide contests.
observations: Blank/null for president and statewide senate; numbered for some 2016 state offices.

name: stage
description: Electoral stage: gen (general), pri (primary) or runoff.

name: indicator_special
description: Whether the contest was a special election.

name: party_detailed
description: Full party label of the candidate's ballot line, uppercase.
observations: For 2016 state offices, mapped from the source single-party column.

name: party_simplified
description: Party collapsed to DEMOCRAT, REPUBLICAN, LIBERTARIAN or OTHER.
observations: Derived from party for 2016 state offices.

name: indicator_writein
description: Whether the candidate was a write-in.

name: mode
description: Mode of voting; TOTAL when returns are not broken down by mode.

name: votes
description: Votes received by the candidate on this ballot line.

name: total_votes
description: Total votes cast in the contest.

name: indicator_unofficial
observations: Null for president and 2016 state offices.
